name: MHC_class2_chr6
description: MHC class II region on chr6p21.32, centromeric portion of the ~3.6 Mb extended MHC. Contains the classical class II genes HLA-DRA, HLA-DRB1/3/4/5 (DRB content varies by haplotype), HLA-DQA1, HLA-DQB1, HLA-DPA1, HLA-DPB1, plus the antigen-processing TAP1/TAP2 and proteasome PSMB8/PSMB9 genes. DRB locus content is haplotype-specific (DR1/DR8 haplotypes carry only DRB1; DR15/16 carry DRB1+DRB5; DR3/11/12/13/14 carry DRB1+DRB3; DR4/7/9 carry DRB1+DRB4) — a known structural variation that breaks reference-based mapping. Sequence polymorphism is concentrated in exon 2 (peptide-binding β1 domain).
expected_copy_count: 1 of each shared gene per haplotype; DRB locus copy number is haplotype-specific (1 or 2 paralog genes)
